title: DSDS Thumbnail Metadata Field
description: A visual thumbnail for compact display contexts. It is a single image, carried as a URL plus required alt text.

thumbnail.description: A visual thumbnail for compact display contexts. It is a single image, carried as a URL plus required alt text.

url.description: URL or relative path to the thumbnail image.

alt.description: Alternative text describing the thumbnail image. MUST be provided for accessibility and MUST NOT be empty.
